summary: Successfully tested Gov. Debt inverse color semantics and new Business Environment panel. All features working correctly - debt increase shown as red (bad), decrease as green (good). Business Environment panel renders EPU Index + BCI metrics with tabs (overview/sectors/drivers). No regressions in existing Economic panel modals.
passed_tests: GET /api/business-environment returns 200
Business Environment API returns EPU headline with value, mom_change, trend_signal
Business Environment API returns confidence headline (overall, current, expected BCI)
Business Environment API returns 4 sectors (Manufacturing, Construction, Wholesale & Retail, Other Services)
Business Environment API returns 4 drivers (general_economic, employment, demand_for_credit, inflation_expectation)
Business Environment API returns confidence history for charts
Business Environment API returns EPU history for charts
Business Environment API returns metadata (latest_month, source, methodology_url, coverage)
GET /api/gov-debt returns 200
Gov Debt API returns latest value with internal/external debt breakdown
Gov Debt API returns mom_change (positive = +1.01% debt increase)
Gov Debt API returns history with breakdown
Gov Debt API returns breakdown metadata
Regression: /api/remittances returns 200
Regression: /api/forex-reserves returns 200
Regression: /api/gold-reserves returns 200
Regression: /api/imports returns 200
Regression: /api/exports returns 200
Regression: /api/pkr-usd returns 200
Regression: /api/current-account returns 200
Regression: /api/liquid-forex returns 200
Gov. Debt card shows positive MoM as RED (negative class) - inverse semantics working
Gov. Debt modal summary shows MoM as RED for debt increase
Gov. Debt modal % Change chart shows RED bars for increases, GREEN for decreases
Business Environment panel loads with KPI grid
EPU KPI card displays value (201.44) and MoM change (-6.64%)
Current BCI KPI card displays value (53.08) and MoM change (+0.33%)
Expected BCI KPI card displays value (57.62) and MoM change (-0.32%)
Overview tab renders by default with BCI and EPU trend charts
Sectors tab switches and renders sector confidence bar chart
Drivers tab switches and renders driver cards (General Economic, Employment, Credit, Inflation)
Footer shows coverage info (16/107 BCI series + EPU)
BCS Methodology link present and correct
Forex Reserves modal opens (no regression)
Remittances modal opens (no regression)
Liquid FX modal opens (no regression)
seed_data_creation: None needed - data fetched live from SBP EasyData API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gov. Debt color semantics fully implemented - EconomicPanel.js uses isGovDebt flag for inverse colors, SBPDataModal.js respects inverse semantics for MoM/YoY changes and % Change chart bars. Business Environment panel is new component (BusinessEnvironmentPanel.js) that fetches /api/business-environment and displays EPU Index (4 Newspapers), Current BCI, Expected BCI in KPI cards with three tabs (overview/sectors/drivers). Backend uses BUSINESS_ENV_SERIES dict to map SBP series codes for EPU and BCI datasets. All existing Economic panel features working with no regressions.
